summary: This confidential case file summarizes the purchase, inspection, failure, technical findings, repair quotation and legal steps related to the Lamborghini Urus Mansory Venatus P820 purchased in Dubai.

events.title: Online advertisement and first contact
events.description: Vehicle found online. Seller: Maestro Motors Dubai. Sales representative: Khaldoun.
events.legal: Start of transaction and seller representations.

events.title: Inspection and diagnostics
events.description: Independent pre-purchase inspection arranged. Vehicle visually inspected, electronically diagnosed and test driven. No engine knocking reported.
events.legal: Routine inspection did not reveal hidden internal engine defect.

events.title: Purchase agreement and payment
events.description: Purchase agreement signed. Purchase price AED 1,000,000.

events.title: RTA, tyres, wrapping and transport
events.description: Additional costs including RTA, new tyres, wrapping and transportation.
events.legal: Consequential damages and costs invested into the vehicle.

events.title: Approx. 39 km after purchase
events.description: Vehicle collected and driven approximately 39 km. Knocking noise appeared.
events.legal: Very short use after purchase supports the pre-existing defect argument.

events.title: Initial inspection and exhaust repair
events.description: Mansory inspected the vehicle and addressed exhaust-related knocking. Further road testing followed.
events.legal: Shows immediate professional inspection after symptoms appeared.

events.title: Oil change and continued knocking
events.description: Engine oil and oil filter replaced. Knocking remained after road test.
events.legal: Noise was not resolved by routine service.

events.title: Internal engine damage found
events.description: Engine opened. Destroyed crankshaft bearings and connecting rod bearings reported. Metal debris found inside the engine/lubrication system.
events.legal: Technical confirmation of severe internal defect.

events.title: Mansory Technical Inspection Report
events.description: Official report describes progressive internal engine deterioration over an extended period and hidden mechanical defect.

events.title: Official Mansory repair estimate
events.description: Mansory Middle East issued official repair quotation for AED 397,800.

events.title: Dubai lawyer consultation
events.description: Dubai lawyer consulted. Recommended lawyer demand letter and attempt at amicable settlement.
events.legal: Legal strategy and next procedural step.

contacts.name: Mansory Middle East
contacts.notes: Issued technical report and repair quotation.
